epic_title: The Twenty One — atproto record write-path vs a local, wipeable PDS
_note: UNIT 28ca4f COMPLETE — EPIC ZMVP-101 CLOSED (2026-07-05): all 5 build tickets merged (102 #96, 103 #94, 104 #95, 105 #97, 106 #98), 107 SKIPPED-AND-CLOSED per its own decision rule (ruling comment on the ticket; residuals re-homed to publish-feature work + identity tickets), epic Done in Jira with closing summary. ZMVP-108 carved (publish-rules owner, backlog). No in-flight work — next unit starts fresh. History: WAVE 1 DONE + INTEGRATED (2026-07-05): 102 #96→374b084, 103 #94→e992872, 104 #95→dd2e920 all squash-merged to main (dd2e920); worktrees removed, branches deleted, main synced. Blocking-Gaps row 9994307 CLOSED (v4 — all v1 blocking gaps resolved). All 3 passed Copilot triage + Opus /security-review + Fable-5 logic pass (2 false-green assertions fixed). NOW WAVE 2: ZMVP-105 (adapter-atproto write path) — deps (103 harness + 104 lexicon) are on main. Cadence continuous; Opus does ALL security-review.
next_action: NONE — unit COMPLETE, epic ZMVP-101 CLOSED 2026-07-05. Next unit via /next-path or /create-epic. Standing non-blocking Engineer flags: 104 ratify-flags (text 3000-grapheme cap; labels-required Safe=empty encoding; snapshot shape OPEN — Lexicon page 10354710 lists optional snapshot while repo JSON omits it additive-later); AC4 exact-pin tripwire in wipe_replay.rs (any additive lexicon field must update the pin deliberately); ZMVP-108 sits in backlog awaiting the publish/compose feature; local index stale by the post-2026-07-02 pages (EXP & Levels 30441473, Non-Toxic Path 30572545, Changelog 30408741, Phases 30408706, Friendship 29884417) — /save-reference sweep offered, not yet taken.

decisions.cadence: continuous; checkpoint at merges + 105 auth fork + every security-review
decisions.102_topology: standalone Bluesky reference-PDS; dev-env local-PLC+PDS bundle as documented fallback; reconcile onto existing local :2582 PLC (SUBMIT=false), not a 2nd endpoint
decisions.103_harness: new shared crate at backend/crates/test-support/ (matches workspace glob, no root Cargo.toml members edit); fixture-provisioner seam returns {PDS endpoint, acting DID/handle, EXTENSIBLE acting-credential (not bare app-password, keeps 105 auth fork open)}
decisions.image_pin: canonical ZURFUR_PDS_IMAGE digest-pinned in .env.example + docker-compose.yml (102 owns, lands first); 103 Rust GenericImage default duplicates the same tag literal WITH a #[test] asserting equality
decisions.hermeticity_invariant: dev loop + test rig make ZERO requests to public atproto / canonical plc.directory — stated once, both lanes enforce the same guarantee
decisions.blocking_gaps_row: CLOSE the 'atproto Lexicon field lists' row on Blocking Gaps for v1 (9994307) — feed.post is the only record v1 publishes; publish-late doctrine covers the rest, documented in the Registry
decisions.feed_post_field_set_SUPERSEDED: OLD interview spec (blob/title/description, single visual blob, Index-side medium/commissionRef) — REPLACED 2026-07-04 by the Replyable-unified spec below. Kept only as history.

feed_post_field_set_UNIFIED.source: Lexicon page 10354710 (v4) + Gallery Posts DD 29949954 §9 (v3) + Replyable DD 30572573 — feed.post is the unified post/reply/shout record; feed.comment deleted

required.labels: com.atproto.label.defs#selfLabels — REQUIRED at schema; compose defaults text-only posts to Safe (encode Safe as selfLabels with empty values[])

optional.text: string, maxGraphemes 3000 DEFAULT (mirrors the description ceiling Engineer set earlier) — FLAGGED for ratification
optional.embed: → app.zurfur.embed.media (blob + REQUIRED alt + optional aspectRatio); accept image/png|jpeg|webp|gif + video/mp4|webm, maxSize 100MB; image-10MB sub-cap enforced app-side
optional.reply: {root, parent}, each arm a union strongRef (com.atproto.repo.strongRef) | did (profile subject) — gallery comment vs profile shout
optional.credits: array of app.zurfur.feed.defs#credit = {role, did}; role open string + knownValues (artist/lines/colors/sketch/commissioner/writer/…); render-suppressible + block-respecting Index-side (consent = moderation road)
optional.snapshot: DEFERRED — DD §9 lists it (optional, 'denormalized Product copy') but gives NO shape; not needed for this epic's round-trip. OMITTED from v1 JSON as an additive-later field; shape is an OPEN Engineer decision. FLAGGED.

feed_post_field_set_UNIFIED.app_rule_not_in_lexicon: at least one of text/embed — enforced app-side (lexicons can't express either-of)
feed_post_field_set_UNIFIED.index_side: descriptive tags (incl. Asks + character tags) — never record fields
feed_post_field_set_UNIFIED.defs_needed: app.zurfur.embed.media, app.zurfur.feed.defs#credit; reply arms reference com.atproto.repo.strongRef + a did subject

decisions.106_capstone_rulings: RULED 2026-07-05 by conductor under epic delegation (Engineer may veto any; evidence = Opus briefing 20260705-153613): F1 publish-rules RE-DEFERRED to NEW ZMVP-108 (no compose layer exists; maturity rule underivable without rating context per Maturity DD 29982722 §4 'label derived from rating, never chosen separately'; capstone ticket mandates no-machinery) — 106 corrects the 3 stale '(ZMVP-106)' doc-comment promises in domain public_record.rs to cite ZMVP-108. F2 app-side publish violations NEVER map into PublicRecordsError::InvalidRecord (the enum classifies XRPC outcomes by contract; NB it already has structural jac_* producers — the earlier 'no producer' ledger note was imprecise); no new producer in 106. F3 capstone home = adapter-atproto/tests/wipe_replay.rs (cargo test --workspace picks it up in CI, AC3 free). F4 wipe = fresh ThrowawayPds per run, whole capstone one #[tokio::test] body boot→flow→drop→boot→flow (stronger than a reset; AC2 no-manual-intervention by construction; never just pds-reset from tests). F5 layered determinism: per-run field-identical read-back + byte-identical getBlob; cross-run feed_post/blob_cid/record_cid equality (SOUND: record CID = deterministic DAG-CBOR content hash of the record value, createdAt pinned — verified against the atproto Repository spec, not memory); assert_ne uri (fresh TIDs); NEVER assert rev/commit-CID (per-instance signature). F6 AC4 is MECHANICAL after all: raw getRecord → stored value keys minus $type ⊆ lexicon defs.main.record.properties (loaded from lexicons/app.zurfur.feed.post.json) + required createdAt/labels present. Security-review: YES mandatory (boundary + fixture token + credits-DID surface), expected light — composes 105's already-CLEAN adapter.

tickets.summary: adapter-atproto writes and deletes records (blobs included)
tickets.pr: https://github.com/ZurNetwork/ZurFur/pull/97 — MERGED 2026-07-05 by Engineer → main 342a7a1 (squash). Integrated same day: main synced, worktree+local branch removed (remote auto-deleted), no compose stack existed, briefing snapshot copied to primary .understand/, Jira → Done. Ticket factual corrections verified ALREADY present in description (Correction 2026-07-05 clause) — stale TODO dropped.
tickets.review_addressed: 2 Copilot comments, both verified REAL, both FIXED in 05f2666 + replied+resolved: (1) upload_blob BlobRef.size now parsed from response blob.size (the repo-recorded size the port documents) w/ request-size fallback mirroring mimeType; (2) AtUri::parse rejects ?/# after the scheme (doc promised no query/fragment; suffix was silently swallowed into rkey — Nsid/RecordKey are non-validating newtypes so nothing downstream caught it) + 2 regression tests. Re-gate GREEN in worktree (fmt; clippy -D warnings; cargo test --workspace 0 fail incl. 4 real-PDS public_records tests — uploaded_blob_downloads_byte_identical exercised the new parse live). Push reconciled 5aff021→05f2666 (lease keyed to fetched oid).
tickets.ship_result: Opus /security-review CLEAN (driven manually vs worktree — cwd hazard): token quarantined (private SmolStr, no Debug/Display, zero logging), no silent-success (all write paths → Err, proven by unreachable/rejected integration tests), domain has no jacquard/reqwest dep, only Did crosses, credits faithful to DD 29949954, raw reqwest uploadBlob safe (validated endpoint, Bearer, no TLS bypass). RESIDUAL (low-risk, noted): couldn't exhaustively prove jacquard's ClientError/XrpcError Display never echoes an Authorization header — token rides .auth() not URL/body; reqwest Display omits headers. Gates green incl. real-PDS integration tests (podman). 4 commits, first [ZMVP-105][uow:28ca4f]. .understand/ excluded. AWAIT Engineer merge; triage Copilot via /address-comments 97 when it lands.
tickets.build_result: GREEN (uncommitted in worktree). Opus /implement TDD: PublicRecords port + value types (domain, ZERO atproto deps) in domain/src/ports.rs + elements/public_record.rs; AtprotoPublicRecords over jacquard xrpc().auth(Bearer from 103 seam) in adapter-atproto/src/public_records.rs; MemPublicRecords; shared contract suite test-support/src/contract.rs run vs both (atproto→ThrowawayPds 4/4, mem 3/3). fmt/clippy clean, cargo test --workspace 0 fail (containers ran, podman). KEY FINDINGS: (1) reference PDS does NOT validate our app.zurfur.* lexicons → AC4 'invalid record' proven via auth-refusal Rejected path; real lexicon validation is 106's job (InvalidRecord variant awaits its 106 producer) — consistent with decided scope. (2) jacquard 0.12 uploadBlob encoder bug (copy_from_slice into empty Vec panics) → worked around with raw reqwest POST; report upstream. Other calls: stateless xrpc vs CredentialSession (DID-resolution needs a host resolver the stub doesn't expose), get_record scoped to acting repo, suite in test-support (+domain+chrono deps).
tickets.owner_recommendation: Claude build (Opus — security-nature) + MANDATORY Opus /security-review. Engineer disposes all 5 forks below.
tickets.decisions_DELEGATED: Engineer granted Claude domain-decision authority FOR THIS EPIC ONLY (dev-only rationale) 2026-07-05 — 'do what you think is best.' Claude's calls (transparent, vetoable): (A+D) DEFINE domain PublicRecords port (create/put/delete/get record + upload_blob; async; jacquard quarantined in adapter; domain-only types) + value types AtUri{did,collection:Nsid,rkey:RecordKey}, StrongRef{uri,cid}, BlobRef{cid,mime,size}, RecordRef{uri,cid}, typed FeedPost (text?/embed?/reply?/credits[]/labels/createdAt mirroring the lexicon) in a one-variant extensible PublicRecord enum. (B) AUTH: Bearer/CredentialSession from the 103 fixture access_jwt; port auth-agnostic; OAuth deferred to 107. (C) SCOPE: faithful CRUD + PDS-as-lexicon-validator; 4 publish rules DEFERRED to 106. (Error) typed PublicRecordsError (Unreachable/Rejected/InvalidRecord/NotFound/Unexpected) mapped from XRPC error not transport. adapter-mem MemPublicRecords fake (content-addressed CID). AC5 shared contract suite (generic over T: PublicRecords) vs Mem + adapter-atproto/ThrowawayPds — NEW, none exists.

tickets.summary: Capstone: a post (with blob) survives wipe-and-replay

tickets.summary: Rung 2: one burner account against the real network (timeboxed)
tickets.ruling: RULED 2026-07-05 (conductor, epic delegation; reopening the ticket = the veto): SKIP-AND-CLOSE per the ticket's own rule — 106 passed AND confidence is high (write path proven vs the digest-pinned upstream PDS image, determinism empirical, CI green). The 3 named unknowns disposed, not dropped: jacquard-OAuth-vs-real-Bluesky re-homed to the publish/compose feature (validates a real OAuth credential arm there, per DD 29687820 + ZMVP-108 — a burner now validates no Zurfur code, no OAuth arm exists); PLC directory behavior owned by identity tickets (ZMVP-51/53, DD 26935298 cutover); latency/rate-limits learned when the first real-network feature ships. Also: burner-written feed.post records would leak pre-publication lexicon shapes publicly (against publish-late, DD 29818896). Full rationale = closing comment on the ticket.
